text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Narita Taishin off to her prerace
weigh-in on the day of the Arima Kinen, I sit
alone in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

Um, excuse me... Would you happen to be Narita
Taishin's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm Taishin's mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An older Umamusume who's the spitting image of
Narita Taishin bows to me while I stare at her in
shock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once my surprise wears off, we chat together for
a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains that while most racers are born in
spring, Narita Taishin was born very late, which
could be why she's so petite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of this, her mother was never able to
properly cheer her on due to her fear that Narita
Taishin might get injured in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet Taishin insisted on racing. And one day when
her mother apologized to her for her small
stature, Taishin became furious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's mother proceeds to hand me a
bouquet of flowers and asks me to give it to her
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Please don't tell her who they're from. She won't
accept them if she knows I'm the one giving them
to her.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Still, I wanted to give her all my support in
today's race. It's the least I can do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's with the flowers?
choice_data_list: Th-they're from a fan! It's for good luck!
Th-they're from a fan! It's for good luck!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Do you two take me for an idiot? And by "you
two," I mean you and my mom.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I told you that my family runs a
business? Well, they run a flower shop.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can tell where these are from just by looking at
how they're wrapped.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. It doesn't matter if my mom's watching
or not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I run for me and nobody else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All I gotta do is run and win.
